authorship: Original vector compositions authored for The Relief Circuit Common Ship runtime. No external art, stock imagery, model weights, or third-party source files were incorporated.
license: Project-owned; distributed under the repository license for this runtime use.
releaseBoundary: This pack prepares the principal vessel environment, all six founding cast portraits, vessel cross-section, and direct operational symbol atlas. It does not claim Gate 6 is executable, assign Program 005, or bind any presentation before the exact accepted Gate 5 Arc bytes are vendored into World.

assets.responsiveIntent: cover crop preserves the common threshold table and at least four visibly incompatible habitat systems

assets.subject: Ilya Venn, rapid-response pilot
assets.responsiveIntent: direct helm, manual abort, and host-baseline dependence remain visible from profile card to decision panel

assets.subject: Nima Quell, aquatic care worker
assets.responsiveIntent: pressure medium, electroreceptive communication, and mediated dry-space access remain legible

assets.subject: Orun Sable, high-gravity maintainer
assets.responsiveIntent: mass, load harness, and direct structural contact remain legible without shrinking Orun into a human-normal silhouette

assets.subject: Tessara One, Manyborn mediator
assets.responsiveIntent: carrier, microbial cloud, chemical vessels, and topological rendering remain simultaneous rather than implying one true body

assets.subject: Arden Pell, nine-year analyst
assets.responsiveIntent: compressed calendars and life-fraction cost remain visible around the short-lived body

assets.subject: Cinder Continuing, Counterborn vessel fork
assets.responsiveIntent: several divergent embodiments remain connected to one contested continuity claim
desktop shows the full systems relation; mobile uses a zoomable or scrollable authored map rather than dropping system labels

assets.surface: six watch tests, seven ship systems, and eight state tracks
assets.responsiveIntent: source atlas may be sliced into exact direct symbols; labels remain documentation rather than runtime law

required: every SVG has semantic title and description metadata
no asset contains embedded raster or remote dependencies
all six founding cast members have distinct authored portraits bound to their actual embodiment claims
the cross-section names all seven ship systems
the symbol atlas covers exactly six watch tests, seven systems, and eight state tracks
no asset is imported by World before Gate 5 source authority is accepted
future Gate 6 browser acceptance proves responsive, forced-colors, reduced-motion, and keyboard behavior
